decision_points.description: Incubation duration at least 15 min (NEB recommendation for 2-3 fragments).

citations.title: NEBuilder HiFi DNA Assembly Master Mix Protocol
citations.tier_justification: NEB protocol recommends 15 min at 50 C for 2-3 fragments.

decision_points.description: Homology overlap length at least 20 bp.

citations.authors: Gibson DG, Young L, Chuang RY, Venter JC, Hutchison CA, Smith HO
citations.title: Enzymatic assembly of DNA molecules up to several hundred kilobases
citations.tier_justification: Gibson 2009 reports efficient assembly with 20-40 bp overlaps.

decision_points.description: Exactly two fragments (backbone + insert) are submitted.

citations.authors: Gibson DG, Young L, Chuang RY, Venter JC, Hutchison CA, Smith HO
citations.title: Enzymatic assembly of DNA molecules up to several hundred kilobases
citations.tier_justification: Gibson-01 is a 2-fragment assembly as validated in the original paper.

decision_points.description: Selection plates use the vendor-recommended 100 ug/mL ampicillin.

citations.title: NEB 5-alpha Competent E. coli
citations.tier_justification: NEB product page specifying 100 ug/mL ampicillin.

wrong_master_mix.canonical_diagnosis: An unrecognised master mix was used; Gibson requires a mix containing T5 exonuclease, a high-fidelity polymerase (Phusion), and a thermostable ligase (Taq).
acceptable_variants: The chosen master mix does not contain the Gibson enzyme trio.
Gibson needs T5 exonuclease + Phusion polymerase + Taq ligase; the chosen mix is not compatible.

citations.authors: Gibson DG, Young L, Chuang RY, Venter JC, Hutchison CA, Smith HO
citations.title: Enzymatic assembly of DNA molecules up to several hundred kilobases
citations.tier_justification: Gibson 2009 defines the enzyme trio required for the assembly.
